description: to_int builtin converts numeric/string values to int64

ToInt converts uint64 to int64, panics on overflow
ToInt parses string to int64

description: NestPushStmt lowers to NestPush runtime call
steps: Codegen lowers NestPushStmt to NestPush(obj, val)
NestPush appends val as nested element (not spread)

E2E: << still spreads, <<< nests in same program
E2E: <<< into empty array produces nested result
